---
title: "Week 4 - SQL and DuckDB"
---

## Learning objectives

-   Continued exploration of SQL concepts including joins, views, and set operations; and apply it to conduct data analysis.


## Slides and other materials

Lecture notes:

-   [lecture-notes-04-mon.txt](lecture-notes-04-mon.txt)
-   [lecture-notes-04-wed.txt](lecture-notes-04-wed.txt)
-   [lecture-notes-data-management-io.sql](lecture-notes-data-management-io.txt)


Data:

- [Class data GitHub repository](https://github.com/UCSB-Library-Research-Data-Services/bren-eds213-data)
